nasb.text: They have hands, but they cannot feel; They have feet, but they cannot walk; They cannot make a sound with their throat.

esv.text: They have hands, but do not feel; feet, but do not walk; and they do not make a sound in their throat.

cnv.text: 有手，卻不能摸； 有腳，卻不能行； 也不能用喉嚨發聲。

ccb.text: 有手不能摸，有脚不能走， 有喉咙也不能发声。

csbs.text: 有手却不能摸， 有脚却不能走， 也不能用喉咙发出声音。
